name: LLM Service Wrappers
description: Abstracts Claude and Gemini API access including key management, model selection, usage tracking, and model complexity analysis. Provides a common base for all LLM-backed operations.

Managers/BaseLlmService.cs.content:
class BaseLlmService
  ApiKeyDecryptionFailed: bool
  IsConfigured: bool
  SaveApiKey(string apiKey) -> void
  GetMaskedApiKey() -> string
  GetApiKeyForRefresh() -> string?
  Dispose() -> void

Managers/ClaudeService.cs.content:
class ClaudeService
  AvailableModels: string[]
  SetUsageManager(ClaudeUsageManager usageManager) -> void

Managers/ClaudeUsageManager.cs.content:
class ClaudeUsageManager
class UsageData
  TotalInputTokens: long
  TotalOutputTokens: long
  TotalCacheReadTokens: long
  TotalCacheCreationTokens: long
  LastUpdated: DateTime
  ModelUsage: Dictionary<string, ModelUsage>
class ModelUsage
  InputTokens: long
  OutputTokens: long
  CacheReadTokens: long
  CacheCreationTokens: long
  RequestCount: int
  GetUsage() -> UsageData
  GetUsageSummary() -> string
  ResetUsage() -> void

Managers/GeminiService.cs.content:
class GeminiService
  AvailableModels: string[]
  IsConfigured: bool
  SaveApiKey(string apiKey) -> void
  IsValidApiKeyFormat(string? key) -> bool
  GetImageDirectory() -> string
class ChatMessage
  Role: string
  Text: string
  ImagePaths: List<string>?
class GeminiImageResult
  Success: bool
  ImagePaths: List<string>
  TextResponse: string?
  ErrorMessage: string?
  Failure(string message) -> GeminiImageResult

Managers/ModelComplexityAnalyzer.cs.content:
class ModelComplexityAnalyzer
  QuickModelSelection(int teamSize, int resultSizeChars, bool hasErrors) -> string
  DetectedIndicators: List<ComplexityIndicator>
  Name: string
  Weight: double
  Occurrences: int
class ModelSelectionResult
  BaseScore: double
  FinalScore: double
  RecommendedModel: string
  Factors: Dictionary<string, double>
  Reasoning: string
  Phase: FeatureModePhase
  TeamSize: int

dependencies: Claude invoked via CLI Process, Gemini via HTTP
